message:
feat(demo-showcase): add pipeline render mode to profile_sweep and demo_pipeline_bench

Add --render-mode flag to profile_sweep supporting both legacy and
production-faithful pipeline paths. Add demo_pipeline_bench criterion
benchmark. Update all demo screens with match guard refactoring and
adjusted rendering for pipeline compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -91,3 +91,7 @@ harness = false
 [[bench]]
 name = "perf_hud_bench"
 harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "demo_pipeline_bench"
+harness = false
